message: Jake
Guy
Kristy
Hey, you made it.
What's with that tone, like you've been waiting for me?
Well, yeah.
Hey, looks like you’re really working hard.

For a guy making millions a year, his place is pretty modest.
It's not as good as his room.
There's a sturdy sofa and a low glass table. I wonder if he usually sits on the floor?
It doesn’t feel very lived-in,
maybe it's because he only comes home a few days a year?
A muscular body typical of a professional athlete, standing 7 feet tall.
His gaze is very sharp.
He looks healthy for someone who's been locked up; is it because he trains regularly or has he been treated well?
My eye level is at most
It feels like I'm being looked down upon around my shoulder.
I'm glad you seem to be doing well.
That's our side of the story, though. What if we can't meet again at the party?
I thought about that, but it looks like it's okay.
Yeah, being under house arrest would be a hassle.
That's true. But, is everything okay now with the baseball team?
I still have to do a bit of manual labor, though. It's tough at my age.
Hold on, haven't you only been in the pros for about four years?
I already feel like an old man.
I was relaxed for a while, so I kind of miss the hustle and bustle of New York.
I see, so you find that nostalgic.
That's a bit serious, isn't it?
Why don't you try being confined once in a while? You can take it easy.
Things are going well right now. I heard he was getting counseling.
Yeah, did she tell you?
Yeah. But he looks like he's gotten something off his chest, and his personality seems to have softened, right?
Now he's thinking he has to protect him, trying to be all virtuous.
Please join us at the wedding.
I thought I was done with the Nets, but I ended up sticking around with them again.
That's not bad, you're still capable of making an impact. Or are you thinking of living a different life?
I think I'd like to run a ranch in the countryside. That suits me better, for sure.
While I was away, you went to the Nets a few times, huh? Those receptionists are pretty cute, right?
I didn’t really notice that.
Come on, you’ve got to be nice to all the women.
I'll bet you've regretted that at some point, huh?
Is that about that girl?
The girl who was bravely trying to rehabilitate you when you were living like a homeless person.
How about settling down soon? You're of that age, right?
Wow, I never thought it would come to this. I thought it would just be a simple discussion.
So, house arrest.
Yeah. The treatment was good, so I didn't complain about that.
But I wasn't allowed to use the phone.
I was crying because there was no contact.
I heard that more times than I can count.
I really felt that I was needed.
Don't touch people's wounds. There are things that I don't want to talk about.
I heard from Garrison that the BAM article was
leaked by someone? And it even paid off Cindy for the trouble.
Did Garrison really say that?
I heard it from Gloria, and they said it was
on someone's orders. Why would they do something like that?
There's a lot to it. I happened to know Eva.
Come on, since you started being a detective, you've gotten a bit pushy. We have our own circumstances, you know. Just leave me alone.
You know, I've suffered a lot.
Since she disappeared,
things got tough,
I get it. The root of everything is
with her. It was a means to smoothly progress the annulment of my engagement with her.
An annulment? Why would you do something like that?
Did you find another girl you like?
It's not like that.
But I thought I couldn't go on with her anymore at that time.
That's all in the past now, it's over, right? Just forgive me.
You would ruin your own career just to break up with her? I can't believe that easily.
Just saying I want to retire and getting confined like that, the world of professional sports seems really tough.
At one point, I thought you might’ve been killed, but I didn’t know you were this fine. I feel like I worried for nothing.
Why did you leak the scandal yourself? I still haven’t heard about that.
Anyway,
I’m glad you’re back.
You should be fine now.
With this,
the mental anxiety should be removed, so logically, things should go back to normal.
I hope you get back to normal quickly.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
